title: Yard Maintenance * Older Adults - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Yard Maintenance * Older Adults 4 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Older Adults Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF AGE+ CIRCLES OF CARE THE DALLES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Matches volunteers with older adults to provide assistance such as friendly visits or phone calls, transportation to medical appointments, grocery shopping, light housework, and yard work. Volunteer opportunities are also available. Eligibility: Supportive services: Age 55 and older Volunteers: Unrestricted Hours: Varies Email (503) 408-0724 Visit Website More Details ANTFARM COMMUNITYCONNECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with yard maintenance tasks such as weeding, clearing gutters, planting, raking, and other services. 39140 Proctor Boulevard Sandy, OR 97055 Eligibility: Older adults and adults with disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 668-7962 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HEARTS WITH A MISSION HEARTS WITH A MISSION MEDFORD HEARTS FOR SENIORS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a volunteer-based companion care program for seniors, assisting with daily tasks such as housework, meal preparation, shopping, transportation to appointments, pet care, home safety, minor repairs, and yard work. The program is volunteer-driven and professionally supported. Volunteer opportunities are available. 517 Edwards Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Companion Care: For individuals aged 65 and older who live independently in their homes and are socially isolated, with no significant cognitive impairment. Volunteers: Varies per assignment Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Companion Care: Varies per assignment Email (541) 646-7385 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOOD RIVER VALLEY ADULT CENTER CIRCLES OF CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a wide range of services to assist with daily needs including help with everyday chores, grocery shopping, light housework, yard work, local transportation, and friendly check-ins. Services are provided by volunteers and program accepts new volunteers's. 2010 Sterling Place Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Supportive services: Age 55 and older Volunteers: Unrestricted Hours: Varies Email (541) 386-2060 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ANTFARM COMMUNITYCONNECT HEARTS WITH A MISSION HEARTS FOR SENIORS HOOD RIVER VALLEY ADULT CENTER CIRCLES OF CARE
